final_clean_result.interpretation: The chronologically safe model selected the zero-effect candidate on inner validation. Forward candidate metrics therefore equal the baseline.

superseded_result_warning: Earlier same-gameweek FPL runs that showed small positive signal are superseded because the provider documents By Gameweek as end-of-gameweek snapshots and only a subset of fields is explicitly deadline-safe.
reactivation_requires_any: a source with verifiable pre-deadline player availability/news timestamps
a new untouched future season using the same frozen strict-chronology design
materially different independently timestamped player-availability evidence
prohibited: retuning on the observed 2025/26 forward holdout
reusing same-gameweek status/news/chance without timestamp proof
mixing cup fixtures into Premier League target matches
manual probability overrides from FPL fields
